channel.title: Example RSS Feed (Parser Fixture)
channel.description: This fixture explains each RSS test case inline so parser behavior can be verified visually. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Integer posuere erat a ante venenatis, dapibus posuere velit aliquet.

item.title: Case 1: Valid article + media:content image
item.description:
Expected: title, excerpt, date, and image are rendered.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.

item.title: Case 2: Missing article link
item.description:
Expected: disabled article action text is shown.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Vivamus sagittis lacus vel augue laoreet rutrum faucibus dolor auctor.

item.title: Case 3: Invalid link scheme
item.description:
Expected: link is sanitized and treated as unavailable.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Cras mattis consectetur purus sit amet fermentum.

item.title: Case 5: Enclosure image fallback
item.description:
Expected: image is read from enclosure URL.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
